summary.source_policy: Uses existing Stage73 and Stage92C exported VitaminC external prediction rows with logits/probs. External labels are used only to diagnose threshold feasibility; no threshold should be promoted or tuned from this result.
summary.main_interpretation: Stage102 checks whether Stage92C's exported probabilities contain a recoverable SUPPORT threshold signal. If balanced diagnostic policies exist, a threshold mechanism may be worth a future clean-only design. If not, the observed SUPPORT/REFUTE tradeoff is not easily separable by simple support probability floors.
